channel.title: Shiv Sena on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Shiv Sena on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Where was his sena ?
item.description:
Bal Thackeray to govt: Attack Pak, don’t warn

Where the hell was his sena when Mumbai was under attack ???

Comments

Comment by Vaibhav on 2008-12-31 15:32:40 +0530

probably drinking and eating murga!!

Comment by Sidhu on 2009-01-01 19:43:24 +0530

Exactly !

Comment by vijay wadnere on 2009-04-14 12:20:25 +0530

Well, what did you expect “Thakeray’s sena’ to do at that time, come and thrash straight into those terrorists equipped with latest weapons?? or you were expecting them to stand in a line to get killed for no reason?
